message:
feat(codegen): Migrate with statement to use builder with captureExpr

Uses the callback-style pattern you requested:
- Builder handles context manager setup (writeIndent, write, writeFmt)
- captureExpr() bridges old genExpr to builder (captures emit output)
- Builder output flushed to self.output before body generation
- Body statements still use emit() (will migrate separately)

This hybrid approach allows incremental migration:
- Context manager scaffolding uses modern builder API
- Expression/statement generation still uses legacy emit()
- Clean separation via captureExpr() bridge

Result: Same test pass rate, cleaner code structure, ready for
full migration once all expression codegen moves to builder.
